text: With respect to deadlocks in an OS, which statement(s) is/are FALSE?

options.A: Banker's algorithm is used to prevent deadlocks
options.B: Deadlock can be prevented by ensuring hold and wait is not allowed
options.C: An assignment edge in a resource allocation graph is from a process to a resource
options.D: A safe state guarantees all processes can finish without deadlock

text: Consider a system with k instances of resource R shared by 5 processes. Each process requires a maximum of two instances and can request/release one at a time. A process can request the second instance only after acquiring the first. The minimum k for the system to be deadlock-free is ______. (answer in integer)
Consider a system with cache and MMU with TLB. When a page is evicted from main memory, cache blocks are marked invalid. For a given memory reference, which sequence can NEVER happen?

options.A: TLB miss, Page table hit, Cache hit
options.B: TLB hit, Page table miss, Cache hit
options.C: TLB miss, Page table miss, Cache hit
options.D: TLB miss, Page table miss, Cache miss

text: Hard disk: rotational speed 15000 rpm. Time to move head to adjacent track = 1 ms. Head starts on track 0. 400 sectors/track, sector size 1024 bytes. Transfer data from 10 randomly located sectors in tracks 5, 12 and 7 (in that order). Total time for data transfer in ms is ______. (rounded off to one decimal place)

A pipelined processor's EX stage performs memory reads for LOAD and operations for ALU instructions. Pipeline clock is 1 ns. Given instruction mix with varying t_EX values, the number of clock cycles the pipeline is stalled due to structural hazards in the EX stage is ______. (answer in integer)
Consider: for(i=0; i<3; i++){ if(fork()==0){ continue; } break; } printf("Hello!"); The total number of times the printf statement gets executed is ______. (answer in integer)

CPU executes two process types: Actuators (A) need 6s CPU burst, Controllers (C) need 8s. New A arrives at t=10,20,30,40,50. New C arrives at t=11,22,33,44,55. FCFS scheduling. First A starts at t=10. Average waiting time for 10 processes in seconds is ______. (rounded off to one decimal place)
